  "findings": [
    "Missing pipe guides near expansion loops",
    "Risk of pipe buckling, misalignment, and expansion joint failure under thermal load"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Isolate or depressurize the system if thermal expansion is actively causing severe misalignment",
    "Install engineered pipe guides on both sides of the expansion loop in accordance with project support standards and MSS SP-58"
  ],
  "rationale": "Expansion loops require properly spaced alignment guides to direct thermal expansion axially into the loop. Without these guides, the piping is prone to lateral buckling, squirm, and catastrophic failure of the expansion joints or piping system while in service.",
  "references": [
    "MSS SP-58",
    "Project support standards"
  ]
}
